title: cuatrecasasiella isernii
intro: Cuatrecasasiella isernii is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy family. The plant is native to Colombia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Cuatrecasasiella isernii is known to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cuatrecasasiella isernii are often made from the leaves and flowers of the plant, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams.
